concepts_used.title: 层次分析法（AHP）
concepts_used.how_used: 将市中心建筑/设施分为不同类型，应用AHP量化不同类型的重要性权重，结合距离确定新租赁站的最佳位置。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we divide the buildings/facilities in the city center into several types and then apply the analytic hierarchy process (AHP) to quantize the different significance of these types.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 对自行车租赁站的位置进行线性回归，找到一条直线使得所有站点到该直线的总距离最小，然后将直线拟合到实际街道。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we apply linear regression to find a line such that the total distance between stations and this line is minimized.

concepts_used.title: 马尔可夫链
concepts_used.how_used: 应用马尔可夫链模型决定工作日和休息日自行车站的状态变化，根据稳态分布分配自行车。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We apply the Markov Chain Model to decide the different status change of bicycle stations on working days and work-free days, and distribute bicycles according to the steady state of the Markov Chain.

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用Google Earth卫星地图和B-cycle地图展示城市现状、现有站点和地铁线路，辅助说明选址依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Fig. 2-2-1. Google Earth™: Downtown Des Moines

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出8条具体假设，包括工作日/休息日租赁量不变、通勤比例50%、年需求增长30%等，为模型简化提供依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 2-1 Assumptions (1.) In one year, the number of rentals and returns at each bicycle station on any working day does not change.

concepts_used.title: 流程图绘制规范
concepts_used.how_used: 使用流程图概述建模过程，将五年计划分为初始计划、改进计划和自行车分配三部分。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We use a flow diagram to streamline our modeling process.
